baselines.name: fixed_neutral_mode
baselines.description: Two neutral (midpoint) runs — measures noise floor. Persona module is working if agent divergence >> baseline.

notes: Total agent runs: 180; Total LLM cost: $0.02; Cost caps: per-turn=$0.10, total=$80.00; Mean response length: exec=1291 chars, anal=1283 chars; Wilcoxon p=0.8150 (agent > baseline)
data_filter: All queries synthetic; no OOS data boundary involved. Fresh agent instance per run (no memory carryover). Embedding model: text-embedding-3-small.
